configurations.name: All apps (turbo)
runtimeArgs: set -e; docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Docker Desktop'; open -a Docker; until docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; echo '>> Docker ready'; }; npx supabase status >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Supabase'; npx supabase start; }; exec npm run dev

configurations.name: Internal admin portal
runtimeArgs: set -e; docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Docker Desktop'; open -a Docker; until docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; echo '>> Docker ready'; }; npx supabase status >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Supabase'; npx supabase start; }; exec npm run dev -w @pts/internal

configurations.name: Client portal
runtimeArgs: set -e; docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Docker Desktop'; open -a Docker; until docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; echo '>> Docker ready'; }; npx supabase status >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '>> Starting Supabase'; npx supabase start; }; exec npm run dev -w @pts/client
